allow: PowerShell($lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\("C:\\Users\\shike\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\GitHub\\3D-Saber\\Assets\\StreamingAssets\\Songs\\ElDorado\\chart.json", [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $bad = 0; foreach \($line in $lines\) { if \($line -match '"y":' -and -not \($line -match '"y":\(  [0-9]\\.[0-9]| -[0-9]\\.[0-9]\)'\)\) { $bad++; if \($bad -le 3\) { Write-Output \("MALFORMED: " + $line.Trim\(\)\) } } }; Write-Output \("malformed y count: " + $bad\))
